PROP-baseauction-inv-070.text: All prices returned by getAssetPrice must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals.
PROP-baseauction-inv-070.assertion: forall getAssetPrice: returned price normalized to 18 decimals regardless of source

locations.note: lines 394-400: data feed price normalized: dec<18 multiply, dec>18 divide; PRICE_DECIMALS=18 constant at line 92
